sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88578" key="prosanapeira/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-πειράομαι</orth>, <sense id="n88578.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">attempt</tr_> the sea <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.123</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l., cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προανα-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
